name: Hansol Logistics Co., Ltd.
summary: Hansol Logistics Co., Ltd. provides logistics services in South Korea and internationally. The company offers third party logistics, e-logistics, and logistics consulting services. The company was formerly known as Hansol CSN Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hansol Logistics Co., Ltd. in May 2014. Hansol Logistics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
